sentences.arabic: تُرِيدُ لَيْلَى أَنْ تُصْبِحَ مُهَنْدِسَةً مِعْمَارِيَّةً فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla želi postati arhitektica u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Layla wants to become an architect in the future.

sentences.arabic: تَدْرُسُ لَيْلَى الْآنَ فِي الْجَامِعَةِ وَتَجْتَهِدُ فِي دُرُوسِهَا.
sentences.translation: Lejla sada studira na univerzitetu i marljivo uči svoje lekcije.
sentences.translationEn: Layla is now studying at the university and working hard in her lessons.

sentences.arabic: تُحِبُّ تَصْمِيمَ الْبُيُوتِ الْجَمِيلَةِ وَالْمَبَانِي الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ona voli dizajniranje lijepih kuća i modernih zgrada.
sentences.translationEn: She loves designing beautiful houses and modern buildings.
